questions.question_text: The Tokyo Skytree 'sways' gracefully during earthquakes while staying completely safe. What does 'sways' mean?

options.text: Collapses suddenly and falls to the ground below
Rotates quickly around a central vertical axis
Moves gently from side to side in a smooth, controlled motion
Breaks apart into separate pieces under extreme pressure

questions.explanation_ar: sways تعني يتأرجح بهدوء، أي الحركة الجانبية اللطيفة من جانب لآخر بطريقة متحكّم بها وآمنة.

questions.question_text: Modern buildings are designed to 'accommodate' seismic forces rather than resist them. What does 'accommodate' mean?

options.text: To completely block and prevent movement from occurring
To absorb, adjust to, and work with something rather than fight it
To measure and record the exact strength of an external force
To ignore a force and continue functioning without any changes

questions.explanation_ar: accommodate تعني يستوعب ويتكيّف مع، أي التعامل مع قوة ما بمرونة بدلاً من محاولة منعها أو مقاومتها.

questions.question_text: Buildings designed to 'flex' during earthquakes often survive better than rigid ones. What does 'flex' mean?

options.text: To bend or move with some degree of elasticity and return to position
To remain completely solid and unmoved under all conditions
To collapse in a controlled manner to protect occupants inside
To increase in height and size when subjected to pressure

questions.explanation_ar: flex تعني ينحني بمرونة، أي القدرة على الانثناء والعودة إلى الشكل الأصلي دون أن ينكسر أو يتلف.

questions.question_text: Viscous dampers are filled with 'viscous' fluid that absorbs earthquake energy. What does 'viscous' mean?

options.text: Extremely thin and easily separated into small droplets
Transparent and allowing light to pass through completely
Thick, slow-flowing, and having high resistance to movement
Frozen solid and unable to move or change shape at all

questions.explanation_ar: viscous تعني لزج وكثيف، أي أن السائل ذو قوام سميك ويتدفق ببطء مما يجعله قادراً على امتصاص الطاقة الحركية.

questions.question_text: Smart buildings can 'adapt' their damping systems to different types of ground motion. What does 'adapt' mean?

options.text: To remain fixed and unchanged in all types of conditions
To break down permanently when conditions change unexpectedly
To adjust and change in response to new or different conditions
To increase in power and strength over a long period of time

questions.explanation_ar: adapt تعني يتكيّف ويتأقلم، أي إجراء التعديلات اللازمة للتعامل مع ظروف جديدة أو مختلفة بشكل فعّال.

questions.question_text: When engineers 'incorporate' dampers into a building, they add them as a permanent structural component.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. incorporate تعني يدمج ويُدخل ضمن التصميم، أي إضافة مكوّن ما ليصبح جزءاً دائماً من هيكل أو نظام أكبر.

questions.question_text: When earthquake technology 'transforms' construction practices, it makes minor decorative changes that do not affect safety.
questions.explanation_ar: خطأ. transform تعني يُحوّل ويُحدث تغييراً جوهرياً، أي تغيير عميق في الطريقة أو الشكل وليس مجرد تعديلات ثانوية.

questions.question_text: The earthquake _____ traditional buildings in the old city while modern flexible structures remained undamaged.
questions.explanation_ar: withstand تعني يصمد ويقاوم، وفي هذا السياق تدل على عجز المباني التقليدية عن مقاومة قوة الزلزال.

questions.question_text: Which sentence uses 'were' correctly in a second conditional sentence?

options.text: If the earthquake was more powerful, the bridge would collapse.
If the engineer was more careful, the building would be safer.
If the seismograph were more sensitive, scientists could detect tiny tremors.
If the alarm was louder, everyone would hear the earthquake warning.

questions.explanation_ar: في الشرط الثاني يُفضَّل استخدام were بدلاً من was لجميع الضمائر في الإنجليزية الرسمية والأكاديمية، كما في الخيار c.

questions.question_text: A friend is worried about living in an earthquake zone. Which second conditional gives the best advice?

options.text: If I will be you, I would install a base isolation system immediately.
If I am you, I will prepare an emergency kit as soon as possible.
If I were you, I would learn the earthquake safety procedures for your area.
If I were you, I will move to a different region without delay.

questions.explanation_ar: صيغة تقديم النصيحة بالشرط الثاني هي: If I were you, I would + مصدر. الخيار c صحيح، بينما تخطئ الأخرى في استخدام will بدلاً من would أو في صيغة جملة الشرط.

questions.question_text: Which sentence has a correct second conditional result clause?

options.text: If buildings were designed better, fewer people will die in earthquakes.
If buildings were designed better, fewer people would die in earthquakes.
If buildings were designed better, fewer people die in earthquakes.
If buildings were designed better, fewer people are dying in earthquakes.

questions.explanation_ar: جواب الشرط الثاني يجب أن يحتوي على would + مصدر، وليس will أو المضارع البسيط أو المضارع المستمر.

questions.question_text: What is the meaning implied by: 'If we had stronger building codes, fewer houses would collapse'?

options.text: Building codes are already strong enough and houses rarely collapse
Building codes will definitely be strengthened in the near future
In reality, building codes are not strong enough and houses do collapse
It is completely possible to strengthen building codes very easily

questions.explanation_ar: الشرط الثاني يُعبّر عن الواقع المعاكس، فقول 'If we had stronger codes' يعني ضمنياً أن المعايير الحالية ليست قوية كافياً.

questions.question_text: The sentence 'If there were no Ring of Fire, the Pacific region would experience far fewer earthquakes' is a correct second conditional.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. were في جملة الشرط و would experience في الجواب يُشكّلان الشرط الثاني الصحيح للتعبير عن حالة افتراضية مستحيلة.

questions.question_text: Match each sentence to the correct explanation of how the second conditional is used.

left_items: If I were a building designer, I would focus on earthquake resistance.
If tectonic plates moved slower, earthquakes would be less violent.
If you lived near a fault line, I would recommend an emergency kit.
If the technology were more affordable, every city would use it.
right_items: giving advice to someone in a specific situation
expressing a personal wish or dream role
describing an impossible or very unlikely scenario
suggesting a practical solution to an existing problem

correct_answer.left: If I were a building designer, I would focus on earthquake resistance.
correct_answer.right: expressing a personal wish or dream role

correct_answer.left: If tectonic plates moved slower, earthquakes would be less violent.
correct_answer.right: describing an impossible or very unlikely scenario

correct_answer.left: If you lived near a fault line, I would recommend an emergency kit.
correct_answer.right: giving advice to someone in a specific situation

correct_answer.left: If the technology were more affordable, every city would use it.
correct_answer.right: suggesting a practical solution to an existing problem

questions.explanation_ar: يُستخدم الشرط الثاني لأغراض متعددة: التعبير عن تمنٍّ، وصف سيناريو مستحيل، تقديم نصيحة، أو اقتراح حل لمشكلة قائمة.

questions.question_text: According to Passage A, where did the 2009 earthquake swarm occur in Saudi Arabia?

options.text: Near Jeddah on the Red Sea coast
In Riyadh in the centre of the Arabian Peninsula
In Harrat Lunayyir, northwest of Medina
Along the eastern coast bordering the Arabian Gulf

questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن سكان حرة لنيّر شمال غرب المدينة المنورة عانوا من آلاف الزلازل الصغيرة على مدى عدة أشهر عام 2009.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, how does a base isolation system protect a building during an earthquake?

options.text: By making the building heavier so that it cannot be moved
By surrounding the building with thick concrete walls that block waves
By separating the building from its foundations using rubber and steel layers
By filling the building's walls with a fluid that absorbs seismic energy

questions.explanation_ar: وصف النص أن العزل الأساسي يعمل بفصل المبنى عن أساساته بطبقات من المطاط والصلب تسمح للأرض بالتحرك دون نقل الاهتزازات للمبنى.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, how do viscous dampers reduce earthquake damage in buildings?

options.text: They prevent the building from moving at all during an earthquake
They convert the kinetic energy of building movement into heat
They anchor the building more deeply into the ground beneath it
They release cooling water to lower the temperature of the structure

questions.explanation_ar: أوضح النص أن المخمّدات اللزجة تُحوّل الطاقة الحركية لحركة المبنى إلى حرارة، مما يُقلّل تأثير الزلزال على الهيكل.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, buildings equipped with base isolation systems experience 80% less shaking during major seismic events.
questions.explanation_ar: صحيح. أفاد الباحثون اليابانيون وفق ما ذكره النص أن المباني المجهّزة بأنظمة العزل الأساسي تُعاني من اهتزازات أقل بنسبة 80%.

questions.question_text: According to Passage B, buildings with base isolation systems experience _____ percent less shaking during major earthquakes.
questions.explanation_ar: ذكر النص أن أنظمة العزل الأساسي تُقلّل الاهتزازات في المباني بنسبة 80% مقارنةً بالمباني غير المجهّزة بهذه الأنظمة.

questions.question_text: Match each earthquake engineering technology from Passage B to how it works.

right_items: metals that return to original shape and repair minor damage automatically
predict building behaviour and automatically adjust damping in real-time
thick-fluid devices that convert movement energy into heat
layers of rubber and steel that separate a building from its foundation

correct_answer.right: layers of rubber and steel that separate a building from its foundation
thick-fluid devices that convert movement energy into heat
metals that return to original shape and repair minor damage automatically
predict building behaviour and automatically adjust damping in real-time

questions.explanation_ar: وردت هذه التقنيات الأربع في النص مع آلية عملها: العزل الأساسي (فصل الأساس)، المخمّدات اللزجة (تحويل الطاقة)، السبائك ذاكرة الشكل (الإصلاح الذاتي)، والذكاء الاصطناعي (التحكم الآلي).
